name: Tabbouleh (Cracked Wheat Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bulghur in a small bowl; pour over the boiling water and let soak for 10 to 15 minutes. Drain and squeeze dry.
2. Place bulgur in a serving bowl and add scallions, green pepper, celery, parsley, mint, and tomato. Toss to mix thoroughly.
3. In a screw-top jar combine lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Shake to mix. Pour over the bulgur mixture. Toss to ensure even distribution. Chill overnight.
Serves 2.
